heading: Institutional refunds
label: 1091b Institutional refunds

children.heading: Return of subchapter IV funds
children.label: a Return of subchapter IV funds

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If a recipient of assistance under this subchapter withdraws from an institution during a payment period or period of enrollment in which the recipient began attendance, the amount of grant or loan assistance (other than assistance received under part C) to be returned to the subchapter IV programs is calculated according to paragraph (3) and returned in accordance with subsection (b).

children.heading: Leave not treated as withdrawal
children.label: A Leave not treated as withdrawal
i
children.text: the institution has a formal policy regarding leaves of absence;

children.label: ii
children.text: the student followed the institution’s policy in requesting a leave of absence; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the institution approved the student’s request in accordance with the institution’s policy.

children.heading: Consequences of failure to return
children.label: B Consequences of failure to return
children.text: If a student does not return to the institution at the expiration of an approved leave of absence that meets the requirements of subparagraph (A), the institution shall calculate the amount of grant and loan assistance provided under this subchapter that is to be returned in accordance with this section based on the day the student withdrew (as determined under subsection (c)).

children.heading: Calculation of amount of subchapter IV assistance earned
children.label: 3 Calculation of amount of subchapter IV assistance earned
i
children.text: determining the percentage of grant and loan assistance under this subchapter that has been earned by the student, as described in subparagraph (B); and

children.label: ii
children.text: applying such percentage to the total amount of such grant and loan assistance that was disbursed (and that could have been disbursed) to the student, or on the student’s behalf, for the payment period or period of enrollment for which the assistance was awarded, as of the day the student withdrew.

children.label: i
children.text: equal to the percentage of the payment period or period of enrollment for which assistance was awarded that was completed (as determined in accordance with subsection (d)) as of the day the student withdrew, provided that such date occurs on or before the completion of 60 percent of the payment period or period of enrollment; or

children.label: ii
children.text: 100 percent, if the day the student withdrew occurs after the student has completed (as determined in accordance with subsection (d)) 60 percent of the payment period or period of enrollment.

children.heading: Percentage and amount not earned
children.label: C Percentage and amount not earned
i
children.text: determining the complement of the percentage of grant assistance under subparts 1 and 3 of part A, or loan assistance under parts B, D, and E, that has been earned by the student described in subparagraph (B); and

children.label: ii
children.text: applying the percentage determined under clause (i) to the total amount of such grant and loan assistance that was disbursed (and that could have been disbursed) to the student, or on the student’s behalf, for the payment period or period of enrollment, as of the day the student withdrew.

children.heading: Differences between amounts earned and amounts received
children.label: 4 Differences between amounts earned and amounts received

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: After determining the eligibility of the student for a late disbursement or post-withdrawal disbursement (as required in regulations prescribed by the Secretary), the institution of higher education shall contact the borrower and obtain confirmation that the loan funds are still required by the borrower. In making such contact, the institution shall explain to the borrower the borrower’s obligation to repay the funds following any such disbursement. The institution shall document in the borrower’s file the result of such contact and the final determination made concerning such disbursement.

children.heading: Return
children.label: B Return
children.text: If the student has received more grant or loan assistance than the amount earned as calculated under paragraph (3)(A), the unearned funds shall be returned by the institution or the student, or both, as may be required under paragraphs (1) and (2) of subsection (b), to the programs under this subchapter in the order specified in subsection (b)(3).

children.heading: Return of subchapter IV program funds
children.label: b Return of subchapter IV program funds
A
children.text: the amount of grant and loan assistance awarded under this subchapter that has not been earned by the student, as calculated under subsection (a)(3)(C); or

children.label: i
children.text: the total institutional charges incurred by the student for the payment period or period of enrollment for which such assistance was awarded; multiplied by

children.label: ii
children.text: the percentage of grant and loan assistance awarded under this subchapter that has not been earned by the student, as described in subsection (a)(3)(C)(i).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The student shall return assistance that has not been earned by the student as described in subsection (a)(3)(C)(ii) in the order specified in paragraph (3) minus the amount the institution is required to return under paragraph (1).

children.label: i
children.text: a loan program under this subchapter in accordance with the terms of the loan; and

children.label: I
children.text: repayment arrangements satisfactory to the institution; or

children.label: II
children.text: overpayment collection procedures prescribed by the Secretary.

children.label: I
children.text: the amount to be returned by the student (as determined under subparagraphs (A) and (B)), exceeds

children.label: II
children.text: 50 percent of the total grant assistance received by the student under this subchapter for the payment period or period of enrollment.

children.heading: Minimum
children.label: ii Minimum
children.text: A student shall not be required to return amounts of $50 or less.

children.heading: Waivers of Federal Pell Grant repayment by students affected by disasters
children.label: D Waivers of Federal Pell Grant repayment by students affected by disasters
i
children.text: who were residing in, employed in, or attending an institution of higher education that is located in an area in which the President has declared that a major disaster exists, in accordance with ;section 5170 of title 42

children.label: ii
children.text: whose attendance was interrupted because of the impact of the disaster on the student or the institution; and

children.label: iii
children.text: whose withdrawal ended within the academic year during which the designation occurred or during the next succeeding academic year.

children.heading: Waivers of grant assistance repayment by students affected by disasters
children.label: E Waivers of grant assistance repayment by students affected by disasters
i
children.text: who were residing in, employed in, or attending an institution of higher education that is located in an area in which the President has declared that a major disaster exists, in accordance with ;section 5170 of title 42

children.label: ii
children.text: whose attendance was interrupted because of the impact of the disaster on the student or the institution; and

children.label: iii
children.text: whose withdrawal ended within the academic year during which the designation occurred or during the next succeeding academic year.

children.heading: Order of return of subchapter IV funds
children.label: 3 Order of return of subchapter IV funds
i
children.text: To outstanding balances on loans made under for the payment period or period of enrollment for which a return of funds is required.section 1078–8 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: To outstanding balances on loans made under for the payment period or period of enrollment for which a return of funds is required.section 1078 of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: To outstanding balances on unsubsidized loans (other than parent loans) made under part D for the payment period or period of enrollment for which a return of funds is required.

children.label: iv
children.text: To outstanding balances on subsidized loans made under part D for the payment period or period of enrollment for which a return of funds is required.

children.label: v
children.text: To outstanding balances on loans made under part E for the payment period or period of enrollment for which a return of funds is required.

children.label: vi
children.text: To outstanding balances on loans made under for the payment period or period of enrollment for which a return of funds is required.section 1078–2 of this title

children.label: vii
children.text: To outstanding balances on parent loans made under part D for the payment period or period of enrollment for which a return of funds is required.

children.label: i
children.text: To awards under subpart 1 of part A for the payment period or period of enrollment for which a return of funds is required.

children.label: ii
children.text: To awards under subpart 3 of part A for the payment period or period of enrollment for which a return of funds is required.

children.label: iii
children.text: To other assistance awarded under this subchapter for which a return of funds is required.

children.label: i
children.text: the student began the withdrawal process prescribed by the institution;

children.label: ii
children.text: the student otherwise provided official notification to the institution of the intent to withdraw; or

children.label: iii
children.text: in the case of a student who does not begin the withdrawal process or otherwise notify the institution of the intent to withdraw, the date that is the mid-point of the payment period for which assistance under this subchapter was disbursed or a later date documented by the institution; or

children.label: B
children.text: for institutions required to take attendance, is determined by the institution from such attendance records.

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: 2 Special rule
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraph (1), if the institution determines that a student did not begin the withdrawal process, or otherwise notify the institution of the intent to withdraw, due to illness, accident, grievous personal loss, or other such circumstances beyond the student’s control, the institution may determine the appropriate withdrawal date.

children.heading: Percentage of the payment period or period of enrollment completed
children.label: d Percentage of the payment period or period of enrollment completed

children.text: in the case of a program that is measured in credit hours, by dividing the total number of calendar days comprising the payment period or period of enrollment for which assistance is awarded into the number of calendar days completed in that period as of the day the student withdrew; and

in the case of a program that is measured in clock hours, by dividing the total number of clock hours comprising the payment period or period of enrollment for which assistance is awarded into the number of clock hours scheduled to be completed by the student in that period as of the day the student withdrew.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: e Effective date
children.text: The provisions of this section shall take effect 2 years after . An institution of higher education may choose to implement such provisions prior to that date.October 7, 1998
